<div class="hero-section">
<div class="profile-image">
<img src="assets/Junkil_Park_photo.jpg" alt="Junkil Park">
</div>
  
<h1 class="hero-name">Junkil Park</h1>

<div class="hero-tagline">
AI for materials discovery and inverse design
</div>
</div>

## Research Interests

- Artificial Intelligence for Materials Discovery
- Materials Inverse Design using Generative Models
- Molecular Simulation and Computational Chemistry

<h2>Experience</h2>

<div class="experience-card">
<div class="experience-logo">
<img src="assets/imperial.png" alt="Imperial College London">
</div>

<div class="experience-content">
<div class="experience-header">
<div class="experience-title">Imperial College London</div>
<div class="experience-period">Present</div>
</div>

<div class="experience-role">Research Associate (2026.05 – )</div>
<div class="experience-location">Advisor: Prof. Aron Walsh</div>
<div class="experience-location">London, United Kingdom</div>
</div>
</div>


<div class="experience-card">
<div class="experience-logo">
<img src="assets/snu.png" alt="Seoul National University">
</div>

<div class="experience-content">
<div class="experience-header">
<div class="experience-title">Seoul National University</div>
<div class="experience-period">2024–2026</div>
</div>

<div class="experience-role">Postdoctoral Researcher (2024.09 – 2026.04)</div>
<div class="experience-location">Advisor: Prof. Yousung Jung</div>
<div class="experience-location">Seoul, South Korea</div>
</div>
</div>


<div class="experience-card">
<div class="experience-logo">
<img src="assets/kaist.png" alt="Korea Advanced Institute of Science and Technology">
</div>

<div class="experience-content">
<div class="experience-header">
<div class="experience-title">Korea Advanced Institute of Science and Technology</div>
<div class="experience-period">2021–2024</div>
</div>

<div class="experience-role">Ph.D. (2021.03 – 2024.09)</div>
<div class="experience-location">Advisor: Prof. Jihan Kim</div>
<div class="experience-location">Daejeon, South Korea</div>
</div>
</div>

<div class="experience-card">
<div class="experience-logo">
<img src="assets/northwestern.png" alt="Northwestern University">
</div>

<div class="experience-content">
<div class="experience-header">
<div class="experience-title">Northwestern University</div>
<div class="experience-period">2022–2023</div>
</div>

<div class="experience-role">Visiting Researcher (2022.08 – 2023.01)</div>
<div class="experience-location">Advisor: Prof. Randall Q. Snurr</div>
<div class="experience-location">Illinois, United States</div>
</div>
</div>




## Links

<div class="links-section">

- Email: [junkil0617@gmail.com](mailto:junkil0617@gmail.com)
- [Google Scholar](https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=rVGLAYIAAAAJ&hl=en)
- [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/in/junkil-park-108b952b5)
- [GitHub](https://github.com/parkjunkil)

</div>
